description_long: This is a tall, rectangular shelving unit with a marble-like finish, featuring four evenly spaced open shelves and a solid back panel. The front face is bordered by a slightly protruding top and bottom ledge, giving it a classic, substantial appearance. The sides are flat and unadorned, while the back is a continuous slab of the same marble-textured material. The shelves are open, with no doors or visible handles, making the contents easily accessible. The overall construction appears sturdy, suitable for storing books, decorative items, or other objects in an urban environment such as a lobby, office, or public space. The color palette is predominantly light beige with subtle veining, mimicking natural stone.
description: A tall, marble-textured open shelving unit with four shelves and a solid back, designed for accessible storage in urban settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing four open shelves and the marble-textured finish, with a prominent top and bottom ledge.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the flat, unadorned panel and the depth of the shelves.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a solid, continuous marble-textured back panel with no openings.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the flat side panel and shelf depth.
